# Fixture: Tesseract2 post-pruning navigation graph for "FF part 2up"
Copied from the user's own pipeline output (Tesseract2 repo, Results/Json/).
682 nodes (35 main rooms, 90 room subnodes, 471 corridor waypoints, 43 doors,
43 outside connectors), 865 edges. Used to test the topospec.data.tesseract
adapter (navigation graph -> SpectrumGraph R2).
